meta.title: The Realignment Ep. 31: Matthew Continetti, Conservatism After the Coronavirus
meta.description:
Matthew Continetti, founding editor of the Washington Free Beacon, joins The Realignment to argue that the coronavirus outbreak has accelerated generational and ideological changes on the right.

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
